markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI-driven content service for Wisdom.ai's AEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Wisdom.ai needs to scale AEO content** beyond its current agencies, whose SEO efforts yield only \~1k new sessions/month and lack AEO expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [**GrowthX offers an end-to-end service** (strategy, 5 articles/week, publishing) using AI workflows to scale quality content, with a 3–6 month timeline to see results.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**The process begins with a 4-week lead time** for a "Strategy Sprint" to define custom AI artifacts (personas, voice) before content production starts.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [**Wisdom.ai's competitors (Snowflake, Databricks)** will be analyzed by GrowthX for the next call to demonstrate a tailored strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

## Topics

### Wisdom.ai's Content Challenge

  - [**Goal:** Scale SEO and AEO content to drive visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [**Current Agencies:** Two agencies produce content, but their SEO results are limited (\~1k new sessions/month), and they lack AEO expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**Competitors:** Snowflake, Databricks, Sigma, ThoughtSpot, Triplo, Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Driven Solution

  - [**Model:** Combines agency expertise with AI workflows to scale content production.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
    1.  [**Strategy Sprint (4-week lead time):** Define custom AI artifacts (personas, voice) to personalize content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
    2.  [**Content Production:** Publish 5 articles/week, with drafts shared via Slack for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
    3.  [**Publishing:** GrowthX handles staging and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
    4.  [**Monitoring:** Client dashboard in Check That tracks AEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Focus:** Prioritizes on-site content (blog, guides) as the most controllable and effective channel for AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Expected Outcomes

  - [**Timeline:** 3–6 months to see significant results.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [**Case Studies:**](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** 3x traffic (25k → 75k sessions/mo), replaced paid ads, and secured top-ranking AEO citations.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
      - [**Tiro:** 6x organic traffic (3k → 18k sessions/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler (GrowthX):** Send SoW, case studies, and resources to Joerg and Sabina.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [**Tyler (GrowthX):** Prepare a competitor analysis (Snowflake, Databricks) for the next call.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [**Joerg & Sabina (Wisdom.ai):** Review materials and schedule a follow-up call.](https://fathom.video/share/pH1KUuDDzHtwRGjuhJwtzjyM9dcjsxG5?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
